case_title: AKUDINOBI EMMANUEL VS OBINNA CASHMIR MR.

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT OBINNA CASHMIR MR. HEARING SET FOR MAY-04-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AKUDINOBI EMMANUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OBINNA CASHMIR MR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL SENT TO CASHMIR OBINNA RETURNED SIGNED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $281.00 FILED BY AKUDINOBI EMMANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT OBINNA CASHMIR MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AKUDINOBI EMMANUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OBINNA CASHMIR MR. $257.80 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $278.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-04-1995, GRANTED
